title: Multiple windows in monday destkop app

posts.author: Ferrugius (Jakub Kalinowski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I wish I could open two boards in two seperate windows. I often work on a few boards at a time and this would make my work much easier. I know I can just use the browser, but that defeats the purpose of the desktop app.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to be able to view two different boards at once on two different monitors in the desktop app.
